docs.title: Cloud2BR TEC Hub
docs.text:
The Technology Education Center of Cloud2BR brings together practical, self-paced learning paths for cloud, data, AI, and platform engineering. Start with a foundation, then move into implementation and production operations.

Choose a path that matches your next outcome

Start with a 101 foundation when the domain is new. Move to 102 when you are ready to build, and 103 when you need production architecture, governance, and operations practices.

Learning principle: Build understanding in layers: concepts first, practical implementation next, then reliable operation at scale.

docs.title: Explore the catalog
docs.text:
Find a learning path All Machine Learning RAG Document Intelligence AI Operations

JavaScript is required to load the interactive catalog. Browse the public repositories at Cloud2BR TEC on GitHub.

docs.title: Learning progression
docs.text:
Learning path Available courses Current progression Machine Learning 101: Foundations -> 102: Applied ML -> 103: Production ML Foundations -> build and deploy -> production operations Retrieval-Augmented Generation 101: RAG Fundamentals -> 102: Build a RAG Application -> 103: Production RAG Fundamentals -> implementation -> enterprise-ready RAG Document Intelligence 101: Document Intelligence ETL Foundation course currently available AI Operations 101: Azure AI Operations Foundation course currently available Catalog maintenance

The repository catalog is sourced from repos-map.yml. Update that map when a public repository is added, renamed, retired, or receives a GitHub Pages site.

docs.title: About Cloud2BR TEC
docs.text: Cloud2BR TEC is a technology learning and enablement platform focused on helping individuals, teams, and organizations explore, learn, and apply modern technology with confidence.

docs.title: What TEC provides
docs.text: Experience Purpose Self-paced learning paths Build practical knowledge progressively, from fundamentals through production practices Guided implementation content Connect concepts to architecture, tools, and working patterns Practical labs and resources Create space to experiment, apply, and adapt learning Community resources Share learning materials and collaborate through open repositories

docs.title: Focus areas
docs.text:
• Cloud fundamentals and architecture
  • Data and AI foundations
  • DevOps and platform engineering
  • Security and governance practices
  • Productivity with modern developer tools

TEC mission: Enable people and organizations to explore, learn, and apply technology with confidence.

Use the hub as your starting point

Each catalog entry links to its GitHub source and, when available, its published learning site. Read the 101 path first when entering a topic, then follow the matching 102 and 103 paths as your needs become more practical and operational.

docs.title: AI Academy Catalog
docs.text:
This page lists the eight public Cloud2BR TEC AI Academy repositories. Each repository is a learning path, progressing from foundations through practical implementation and production operations.

Published learning sites

When a repository has a GitHub Pages site, the primary button opens the learning experience. Every catalog item also retains a direct link to its GitHub repository.
